notes: User is debugging why three MCP servers (Context7, Playwright, Serena) show as 'failed' in Claude Code and two (Greptile, Linear) show 'needs authentication'. The session is iterative triage: reproduce Context7 locally, catch an EPERM permission error from a corrupted npx cache dir on `D:/AppData_Local/npm-cache/_npx/eea2bd7412d4593b`, clear it; then debug Greptile auth by setting GREPTILE_API_KEY as a proper Windows env var (setx) and reverting the cached plugin .mcp.json to reference ${GREPTILE_API_KEY}. Linear is a distractor — turns out to just need OAuth via the MCP dialog, not API key config (forbidden slug). Multiple follow-ups (rename .txt to .md, restart Claude Code for setx to take effect) are also operational noise, not architectural.
